title: tragiopsis involucrata
intro: Tragiopsis involucrata is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, commonly known as the Tragiopsis plant. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tragiopsis involucrata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Traditionally, Tragiopsis involucrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
